MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Roger Tonna is present.
Attorney Badma Gutchinov, specially appearing for William Gilg appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michael Gomez is present.
Attorney Hope Greenhill representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsels and litigants confer in hallway.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of AUG-27-2012 is vacated.
